sections.title: Before completion of In Search of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Hello there friend. I'm afraid all boat rides are out of service due to the high ghast activity in Mort Myre.

sections.title: After completion of In Search of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help in finding the Myreque.

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Well, I'd like to say that you're welcome. But I heard that you led Vanstrom straight to their hideout. I feel so guilty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, yeah, I know how you feel.

sections.title: After completion of Sins of the Father

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help in finding the Myreque.

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Well, I'd like to say that you're welcome. But what does it matter now? The Drakans killed the whole lot of them.

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: I'll have to charge you 10 gold to cover the loan of the boat. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll pay the ten gold.

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Sorry, but you don't have that much. No money, no boat!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I won't use the boat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about you let me use the boat for free?

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Hmm, use the boat for free... Very well, that sounds fair enough to me.

lines.speaker: Cyreg Paddlehorn
lines.text: Sorry my friend. You don't seem to have the funds for the trip. It will cost you 10 gold.
